ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES FROM DEFENDANT JOHN MORGAN CLAREY TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION (SET ONE) AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY, 302, AS TO PLAINTIFF TENTH AND MARKET LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES FROM DEFENDANT 5 BARS INSIDE, DEFENDANT 5 BARS HAS FAILED TO RESPOND TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION AND HAS ALSO FAILED TO FILE ANY RESPONSE OR OPPOSITION TO THE PENDING MOTION. ACCORDINGLY, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED WITH 20 DAYS TO RESPOND AND SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT 5 BARS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1825, TO BE PAID WITHIN 20 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF TENTH AND MARKET LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL JOHN MORGAN CLAREY TO APPEAR AT DEPOSITION AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS REQUESTED AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 2, 2016 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, DISCOVERY, PER THE AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. JUDGE PRO-TEM: NAOMI GRAY; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff To Compel Further Responses From Defendant 5 Bars Inside
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. LUKE N. EATON, ESQ. of Gibbs, Giden, Locher, Turner, Senet & Wittbrodt LLP, Tel No. 310-552-3400 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Plaintiff's counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF TENTH AND MARKET LLC's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendant 5 Bars Inside, Defendant 5 Bars has failed to respond to plaintiff's requests for production and has also failed to file any response or opposition to the pending motion. Accordingly, plaintiff's motion to compel is granted with 20 days to respond and sanctions are awarded against defendant 5 Bars in the amount of $1825, to be paid within 20 days. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
